properties.description:
Fires pl_transform_facts every day at 6:00 AM IST (00:30 UTC).

Time zone math:
  IST = UTC + 5:30
  6:00 AM IST - 5:30 = 00:30 UTC

@trigger().scheduledTime is passed as p_run_date so the pipeline
builds the correct blob filename for that day's ingestion output.

Ingestion scripts must deposit processed/ blobs by 5:30 AM IST.
The 3 Validation activities inside pl_transform_facts give an
additional 10-minute grace window (polls until 6:10 AM IST).
